changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-treesitter/src/chunk.rs (70.3% coverage, 149/212 lines)

Uncovered code (~63 lines):
- SemanticChunk byte_len(), content(), path() for Parsed variant (lines 74-162)
- Various ChunkSource::Parsed branch handling
- chunk_with_context() - context expansion around chunks (lines 375-393)
- Database record conversion methods (lines 421-429, 462-501)

The Parsed variant of ChunkSource has several uncovered accessors and the context expansion logic needs testing with real parsed files."
Test treesitter chunk edge cases (parsed source variants, byte-range extraction)
